subject: ri_policy_router
summary: The weak pre-aged release candidate hits the intended seam-A row but still worsens both fail-set windows through broader action churn.
mechanism: The local seam correction suppresses additional earlier longs and later admits replacement continuation entries, so the overall fail-set trade-off becomes worse instead of better.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat 'target row hit' as sufficient evidence of improvement.
Do not advance this candidate to keep-set or stress-set verification in its current form.
next_admissible_step: Explain and bound the broader churn mechanism before framing any next seam-A runtime candidate.
